description: Audio drifts out of sync with video after the 22 minute mark in the US English track
Japanese subtitle timing is offset by roughly 1.5 seconds throughout episode 3
Thumbnail artwork shows placeholder gray box instead of final key art
Portuguese dub track cuts out completely between minutes 40 and 45
Closed captions missing entirely for the Spanish subtitle track
Minor color banding visible in dark scenes on 4K playback
Episode title card typo: "Shaddow Ember" instead of "Shadow Ember"
Content fails to load on release region JP due to missing region entitlement flag
Korean subtitles reference a character name that was changed in final dub script
German dub audio levels are noticeably lower than the English track
